cards.title: When He Said He'd Never Wanted Children
cards.body: Carmen Pavlovic always dreamed of motherhood, but her partner Pete had no interest—until one night in Beijing when he made an unexpected offer. Sometimes life-changing decisions come from the most surprising moments.

cards.title: Keeping Dead Wife's Books for Our Son
cards.body: A father finds healing by preserving his late wife's beloved novels and reading them with their son. Through shared stories, he reconnects with her memory and lets go of overwhelming guilt.

cards.title: One-Night Stand to Married With Babies
cards.body: What started as a casual hookup blossomed into marriage and parenthood for Sofia and León. They're now discovering new ways to maintain intimacy while raising two young children.

cards.title: Britain Must Afford to Raise Children
cards.body: The government is investing billions in childcare support to help families with costs. However, officials warn that profiteers may be preventing families from receiving the full benefit of assistance.

cards.title: Family Estrangement: Mixed Effects on Wellbeing
cards.body: Estrangement isn't all-or-nothing but exists on a spectrum of reduced contact. Research shows support systems play a crucial role in wellbeing, regardless of whether reconciliation happens.

cards.title: Single Parents Less Happy Than Coupled Parents
cards.body: Research comparing parental happiness reveals significant differences between single and partnered parents. Understanding these dynamics helps inform support systems for all family structures.

cards.title: The Secret to Best Summer With Kids
cards.body: Summer promises carefree fun but quickly turns to boredom and anxiety without structure. Adding intentional planning helps children thrive during the long break.
